subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Lawal Dania
body:
Hi Lawal Dania,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at AINAD London. Would love to swap notes on Tech, social impact, Potential Investor, Stage: Seed.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]
